name: printify
description: Reads and writes Printify shops, catalog resources, products, orders, uploads, and webhooks through the Printify public API.

risk.read: external Printify API read of shop, catalog, product, order, upload, and webhook metadata
risk.write: creates, updates, publishes, unpublishes, deletes, archives, disconnects, submits, cancels, and simulates Printify resources depending on the selected write action
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token; destructive product/order/shop/upload/webhook actions are marked destructive
